evals.name: eval-extract-template
evals.prompt: Extract a template from this codebase
evals.expected_output: A Copier template directory with copier.yml, CLAUDE.md.jinja, .claude/architecture.md.jinja, skeleton source files, and ecosystem config files. Should capture: Bun runtime, microcommand pattern, manual flag parsing, SQLite+WAL, TOML config with XDG bifurcation, --json output mode.

evals.name: eval-vague-prompt
evals.prompt: Templatize this project so we can spin up similar tools
evals.expected_output: Same quality output as eval 1 despite vaguer prompt. The skill instructions should be robust enough that prompt phrasing doesn't degrade the result.
